Build the full 6 × 6 × n_cycles transition-probability array (vectorised)

Source: R/utils-engine.R
dot-build_tp_array.Rd

Same per-cell formulae as .build_tp_matrix() but populates the entire array in one pass: 17 vector assignments instead of 17 * n_cycles scalar assignments, no per-cycle data-frame row extraction, no dimnames on the inner slabs. State order matches .build_tp_matrix: 1 = N_always, 2 = N_prev, 3 = OW, 4 = OB1, 5 = OB2, 6 = D.

Usage

.build_tp_array(transition_probs, mort, set_zero = NULL)

Arguments

transition_probs

Data frame with the six per-age transition columns (NW_OW, OW_NW, OW_OB1, OB1_OW, OB1_OB2, OB2_OB1).

mort

List from .build_mortality_vec() with elements NW, OW, OB1, OB2.

set_zero

Optional character vector of transitions to zero out; supported values: "OB1_OB2", "OW_OB1".

Value

6 × 6 × n_cycles numeric array, no dimnames.

On this page

Developed by Nicolai Damslund, Gudrun M W Bjørnelv, Yufei Jiang, Magnus Skov Larsen, Christina Hansen Edwards, Vidar Halsteinli, Rønnaug A Ødegaard, Line Planck Kongstad.
